stem: Triangles GHJ and KLJ partially overlap. Side GH of triangle GHJ intersects side KL of triangle KLJ at point M. The measure of angle GMK is 138°, and the measure of angle MKL is 47°. Angles ∠GMK and ∠KML are supplementary. If x° is the measure of angle KLM in triangle KLM, what is the value of x?
rationale: Since ∠GMK and ∠KML are supplementary, ∠KML = 180 − 138 = 42°. The three interior angles of triangle KLM sum to 180°, so ∠KLM = 180 − 42 − 47 = 91°.
